download.title: Download Minecraft
download.confirm_cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel the download?

onboarding.choose_language_desc: Please select your preferred language. Click "Next" to continue.
onboarding.welcome_desc: Welcome to SimpMC Launcher! Let's get things set up real quick.
onboarding.install_minecraft_desc: You can choose to install Minecraft after finishing the setup wizard.
onboarding.wardrobe_setup_desc: Manage your character skins and capes through the Wardrobe feature.
onboarding.create_character_desc: Create your game character and choose your login method (Offline, Third-party, or Microsoft). Click "Next" to continue.
onboarding.setup_complete_desc:
Congratulations! SimpMC Launcher is ready to go.

Enjoy your journey!

auth.microsoft_email_required: Please log in with your Microsoft account first

slogan.morning: A brand new day has begun, full of energy! Let's do our best today~
slogan.midmorning: The sunshine is perfect. Grab a cup of sweet juice and keep going!
slogan.noon: Rumble... Your stomach is protesting! Go grab some delicious food to recharge~
slogan.afternoon: *Yawn* Feeling a bit sleepy? How about taking a short break before diving back into the game?
slogan.dusk: Sunset falls on the windowsill. You've worked hard today, welcome back home!
slogan.evening: Though it's getting late, our story has just begun. Would you like to dim the lights a bit?
slogan.night: The moon is out on patrol! Start your new world under the quiet starlight.

settings.title: Settings
settings.download_settings_desc: Manage game installation directory, concurrency limits, etc.
settings.install_path_hint: Minecraft versions and assets will be installed here
settings.download_source_hint: BMCLAPI mirror offers faster downloads in certain regions
settings.concurrent_downloads_hint: Higher concurrency speeds up downloads but might cause failures
settings.max_retries_hint: Number of automatic retries when a download fails
settings.personalization_desc: Customize launcher appearance and display settings
settings.profile_management_desc: Add, edit, or remove game characters
settings.language_desc: Change the display language of the interface
settings.display_name_desc: Set the name shown in the home greeting. Defaults to the local system username.
settings.music_hint:
Music files should be placed under the 'SimpMC/music' directory.
Use Ctrl + Scroll Wheel to adjust volume, Ctrl + M to toggle the mini player.
Visit our website to learn more.
settings.bg_img_hint:
Images should be placed under the 'SimpMC/bg_images' directory.
SimpMC will pick a random image as the background on each launch.
Visit our website to learn more.
settings.heartbeat_desc: Set the interval for sending online status heartbeat packets

profile.title: Manage Profiles
profile.empty: No profiles found, please add a new one

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe
wardrobe.name: Name
wardrobe.skin_preview_hint: Drag with your mouse to rotate the skin. Name edits are saved automatically.

info.title: Beta Feature
info.description: Still under development, this feature may be unstable.

widgets.title: Widget Store
widgets.description: A variety of home widgets for you to choose from!

versions.title: Versions
versions.download_hint: Click the button above to download a version and start playing
versions.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete version {version}? This action cannot be undone.

widgets.title: Widgets
widgets.external_import_url_placeholder: Enter the URL of the JSON file containing widget configurations
widgets.external_import_hint: Enter the URL of the JSON file containing widget configurations
widgets.import_failed_network: Failed to fetch external widget, please check your network connection
widgets.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this widget?
widgets.remove_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? You can add it back from the store later.
widgets.no_config_support: This widget does not support configuration
widgets.security_warning_intro: You are importing an external widget from an untrusted source, which may pose the following risks:
widgets.security_warning_conclusion: Do you wish to continue? SimpMC is not responsible for any issues caused by external widgets.
security_warning_risks: The code might contain malicious scripts to steal your personal data
The code might send data to third-party servers without your knowledge
The code might impact the normal performance of the launcher
The safety of untrusted code cannot be guaranteed
widgets.load_official_failed: Failed to load official widget template

about.description: A lightweight, clean, and beautiful Minecraft launcher
about.author: Author
about.oss_thank: Special thanks to the following open-source projects! Without them, SimpMC Launcher wouldn't exist.
about.not_official_product: SimpMC Launcher is NOT an official Minecraft product. It is not approved by or associated with Mojang or Microsoft.
about.license_desc: This project is open-source under the Apache-2.0 License. See the LICENSE file in the repository for details.

update.title: New Version Available!
update.update_error: An error occurred while checking for updates.
update.network_error: Network error, failed to check for updates.
update.snapshot_title: You are currently using a Snapshot/Dev version.
update.snapshot_message: Snapshot/Dev versions may contain unstable content and will not check for updates automatically.

social.title: Social
social.weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters long and contain both letters and numbers.
social.reg_tip:
Thank you for registering a SimpMC account!
Please keep your username and password safe.
social.not_login: You are not logged in yet, please
social.go_to_login: Already have an account? Log in here
social.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is irreversible!
social.delete_failed: Deletion failed, the password might be incorrect
social.account_hint:
Your SimpMC account is your identity credential for using online services. Sensitive information associated with your account is encrypted.
By using SimpMC online services, you signify that you have read and agreed to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
social.test_notification_body: This is a test notification from SimpMC.
social.request_result_tip: You can only view the result of each request here once; it will not be displayed again afterward.
